title: Unsanitized issue ids can write outside .waystation/issues
description: createIssue builds the issue filename directly from input.id. Because create_issue is exposed through MCP and the dashboard, a caller can pass path-like ids such as ../tasks/task-a and write outside .waystation/issues, corrupting other record types. Affected: src/core/issue.ts. Fix by validating ids and/or resolving the destination path and ensuring it stays inside the issues directory before writing.
resolution: Fixed by rejecting unsafe user-supplied issue ids before path construction, resolving the destination path, and asserting it remains inside .waystation/issues. Added regression coverage for path-like issue ids.
